content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴，今日发布～欢迎大家收听、下载及分享～如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴
她猖獗、暴戾、喜怒无常，同时她亦宽仁、博学、充满智慧。
她是荒淫的暴君，也是羔羊的庇护者，她赐予你爱，也赐予你死。这片土地上的一切生灵都要匍匐在她的脚下，尊敬地高呼她的名号。
在女王的舞会上尽情沉醉吧，然后与她一起，沉入永恒的黑色火焰。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
规划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST：" Wanda EP: A Toast to Death" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Wanda EP: A Toast to Death"
She is wild, tyrannical, and mercurial. She is gracious, sagacious, and brimming with wisdom.
A depraved despot, yet a guardian of the lambs; she bestows love, and she delivers death.
All living things upon this land must kneel at her feet, reverently chanting her name.
Drown yourself in the Queen’s ball, and then descend with her into the eternal black flames.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：旺达EP·赴死酣宴
